introSuffix: ) is your npm namespace and your account: it owns its members, profile, and published packages. Claiming one makes you its first admin.
noScopes: You don't own any scope yet. Claim one above to get started.
leaveOnlyAdmin: You are the only admin. Promote another member to admin before you can leave.
leaveDescription: You will lose access to this scope and its plugins.
leaveDialogSuffix: ? You will lose access to this scope and its plugins.
logoDescription: Shown on your public scope page. Cropped and converted to WebP in your browser before upload.
displayNameDescription: The name shown on every package this scope publishes, overriding the manifest author. Leave blank to clear it.
domainsDescription: Prove your scope controls a domain via a TXT record, then verify. Verified domains show a badge on your public scope page.
txtInstructionsSuffix: record at your DNS provider, then verify. Propagation can take a few minutes.
publishersDescription: Authorize a GitHub repo + workflow to publish to this scope from CI with no token (OIDC). A release running that workflow publishes to Brika; a publish from anywhere else is refused.
publishersEmpty: No trusted publishers. CI publishes to this scope are refused until you add one.
membersDescription: Members are identified by their Brika user ID. Emails are never shown or stored on the scope.
removeMemberDialogSuffix: from this scope? They will lose access immediately.
addMemberDescription: Add someone by their account. They will lose access if you remove them; we never list or search users by email.
addMemberEmailAriaLabel: Email of the account to invite
